case_title: NYIMA DORJE VS. LATREAST MONIA JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF DORJE, NYIMA
(SC-108A)ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-12-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LATREAST MONIA
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORJE, NYIMA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF NYIMA DORJE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LATREAST MONIA JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORJE, NYIMA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LATREAST MONIA
(SC-108) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORJE, NYIMA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LATREAST MONIA
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LATREAST MONIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DORJE, NYIMA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LATREAST MONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DORJE, NYIMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LATREAST MONIA PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS FROM AN AUTO ACCIDENT WHERE DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE COLLIDED WITH PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE CAUSING DAMAGE TO VEHICLE WHICH WAS RENTED. DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY PAID FOR REPAIRS. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED NO OTHER EVIDENCE OF ANY DAMAGE IN THE WAY OF PERSONAL INJURY OR WAGE LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
